dict.string: ClawAntenna uses motion data to detect your activity type, count steps, and measure altitude changes.
ClawAntenna measures ambient noise levels in decibels. No audio is recorded or stored.
ClawAntenna scans for nearby Bluetooth devices to log their presence and signal strength.
ClawAntenna counts your photos and videos to track library growth over time. No photos are read or uploaded.
ClawAntenna counts today's calendar events to track how busy your schedule is. No event details are read or uploaded.
